title: Build the Complete Portal
desc: Unified immersive interface for 190 compounds, 24 meditations, 11 texts, 28 Echo Chamber voices — 1,206 lines, fully functional

title: Mobile polish and responsive design
desc: Comprehensive mobile CSS, touch targets, safe area support, modal improvements — portal works on all devices

title: ASSESS: Evaluate the Complete Portal
desc: What does the portal achieve? What did it cost? What does it enable? Document the value and limits of 1,206 lines of immersive infrastructure

title: REST: Witness the completion
desc: The portal stands complete. Honor the work without adding to it. Presence without production.

title: Define what follows the portal
desc: After assessment and rest, what wants to emerge? The 190 compounds have their portal — what becomes possible now?

title: TBD: Successor to portal phase
desc: To be defined based on assessment and question outcomes
